content.text: Draft a short newsletter intro from my notes on focus.

## This week: protecting your focus

We spend our days reacting — pings, tabs, the next thing on the list. But the notes you've been keeping point at something simpler.

> The work that matters rarely shouts. It waits for a quiet hour.

So start there this week: **one** protected hour, *before* the inbox. Everything below builds on it.
